title: How to Build an App From SCRATCH with Lovable + Supabase

segments.text: What if I told you that you can build
your own app from scratch without any
coding knowledge and without any
experience? You'd probably say I'm
crazy. Well, to prove it to you over the
next 60 minutes, I'm going to be doing
exactly that with two of my favorite AI
coding tools, Lovable and Superbase. And
I'm going to be breaking down every step
of the process. Building the app,
connecting it to the database, creating
authentication, and then connecting it
to a custom domain. And of course, I'm
going to sprinkle in a little bit of AI
as well. And because we have so much to
cover, let's jump straight in. Okay, so
first off, what are we actually going to
be building? Well, before building We
Are No Code, I was actually the director
of a startup accelerator program here
based in LA. And I used to train
founders and then we would help them
pitch on stage at Google to raise money
from investors. And so, as part of that
role, I was often invited to come and
speak on panels at startup events. And I
remember this one event called Tectonic.
As soon as I stepped off stage, I had a
bunch of founders who lined up to come
talk to me. And each one of these
founders was pitching me on their
startup idea. But I'll never forget when
I left the convention center, I pretty
much didn't remember 90% of what these
companies actually did. And that's
because they would just deliver a huge
wall of information. And that's because
they didn't have experience pitching.
And so I had the idea to transform a
founder's voice talking about what
they're doing into a highly optimized
oneliner and a pitch deck structure. And
so it's basically your AI pitch mentor
who's trained on the best practices for
pitches. And now that we have the idea,
my friends, it's time to jump into the
build. This, my friends, is lovable. And
